entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0207.10722] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 10,322,928. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the lien:PublicAdministrationMember industry. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 10,323,000 that includes the member lien:PublicAdministrationMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:CorporateDebtFirstLienSeniorSecuredMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=lien:PublicAdministrationMember. The value representing the fair value of investments in the lien:PublicAdministrationMember industry is less than the value reported for the value 10,323,000 which is a subset of this industry. The value reported for the industry in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 10,323,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 10,323,000 Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=lien:PublicAdministrationMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:CorporateDebtFirstLienSeniorSecuredMember
Rule Element Id:10722 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - lien-20250930.htm 8532

property.name: label
property.value: Non-control/non-affiliate investments at fair value (amortized cost of $310,270,261 and $274,346,711, respectively)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0207.10722] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 2,994,731. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the lien:ManufacturingMember industry. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 2,995,000 that includes the member lien:ManufacturingMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=lien:ManufacturingMember, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:USCorporateDebtFirstLienSeniorSecuredMember. The value representing the fair value of investments in the lien:ManufacturingMember industry is less than the value reported for the value 2,995,000 which is a subset of this industry. The value reported for the industry in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 2,995,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 2,995,000 Period : 2025-09-30 Dimensions : us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:USCorporateDebtFirstLienSeniorSecuredMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=lien:ManufacturingMember
Rule Element Id:10722 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - lien-20250930.htm 4948

property.name: label

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0207.10722] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 11,659,571. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the lien:PublicAdministrationMember industry. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 11,660,000 that includes the member lien:PublicAdministrationMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:USCorporateDebtFirstLienSeniorSecuredMember, us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=lien:PublicAdministrationMember. The value representing the fair value of investments in the lien:PublicAdministrationMember industry is less than the value reported for the value 11,660,000 which is a subset of this industry. The value reported for the industry in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 11,660,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0207.10722] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 2,796,946. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the lien:HealthCareAndSocialAssistanceMember industry. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 2,797,000 that includes the member lien:HealthCareAndSocialAssistanceMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:CorporateDebtFirstLienSeniorSecuredMember, us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=lien:HealthCareAndSocialAssistanceMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US. The value representing the fair value of investments in the lien:HealthCareAndSocialAssistanceMember industry is less than the value reported for the value 2,797,000 which is a subset of this industry. The value reported for the industry in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 2,797,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 2,797,000 Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=lien:HealthCareAndSocialAssistanceMember, us-gaap:InvestmentIssuerAffiliationAxis=us-gaap:InvestmentUnaffiliatedIssuerMember, us-gaap:InvestmentTypeAxis=lien:CorporateDebtFirstLienSeniorSecuredMember, srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:US
